title: hypixel skyblock storage gui
description: lets u see all of ur skyblock storages in one larger menu. works 50% of the time 100% of the time. i made this because i dont wanna use that shitty firmament mod.
body:
lets u see all of ur skyblock storages in one larger menu. works 50% of the time 100% of the time. i made this because i dont wanna use that shitty firmament mod that sends all ur stuff to the server!!!

i made this for myself but thought maybe other people wouldnt want to use that firmament mod too so i put it here. 


dm voxlbladesucks on discord if u have problems but thats my alt so if i dont respond fast dont be sad im nnot egoing u
